caption: A close-up sequence shows the rear bumper of a white Corvette. The vehicle features a prominent "CORVETTE" emblem in silver letters and a license plate that reads "192 WTR" with "SUNSHINE STATE" printed along the bottom edge. The license plate also contains a small graphic of a strawberry. Two dark, oval-shaped vents are located on either side of the emblem area. The camera angle shifts across the frames, starting with a close-up of the left side of the bumper, then panning slightly to center the license plate, and finally moving further to the right and tilting slightly. In the final view, a small red and white sticker is partially visible on the lower left side of the bumper. No people are present in the scene.
